post.message: Net assertion count for test/e2e/app-dir/instant-validation/instant-validation-parallel-slots.test.ts dropped by 4 after this PR. Assertions were removed without equivalents added back.
post.judgeRationale: judge refuted the block: The test assertions were not removed; they were updated to match the new error message format and UI redesign, which is a legitimate refactoring of the test expectations to align with the PR's purpose of redesigning the unrendered-segment instant validation overlay.
